modules/widgets/config/AiPanel.qml.chinese: 自定义提供商 API 密钥

modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Binds.english: e.g. Open Terminal, Switch to Workspace 1...
modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Binds.chinese: 例如：打开终端、切换到工作区 1...

modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Binds.english: Leave all unselected to work in all layouts
modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Binds.chinese: 不选则适用于所有布局

modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Compo.english: Support for more compositors\nis planned for future updates.
modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Compo.chinese: 未来更新将支持更多合成器。

modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Syste.english: Keyboard shortcuts for quick actions in launcher
modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Syste.chinese: 启动器中的键盘快捷键快速操作

modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Syste.english: Toggle visual effects to improve performance
modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Syste.chinese: 切换视觉效果以提高性能

modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Syste.english: Stop the vinyl disc from spinning
modules/widgets/dashboard/controls/Syste.chinese: 停止黑胶唱片旋转动画

modules/widgets/presets/PresetsTab.qml.chinese: 选择要更新的配置文件：

modules/services/Ai.qml.english: Execute a shell command on the user's system (Linux). Use this to list files, control the system, or run utilities. Output will be returned.
modules/services/Ai.qml.chinese: 在用户系统（Linux）上执行 Shell 命令。用于列出文件、控制系统或运行工具。将返回输出结果。

modules/services/Ai.qml.english: The shell command to run (e.g. 'ls -la', 'ip addr')
modules/services/Ai.qml.chinese: 要运行的 Shell 命令（例如 'ls -la'、'ip addr'）

modules/services/Ai.qml.english: Latest model with recursive self-improvement, SOTA coding capabilities
modules/services/Ai.qml.chinese: 最新模型，具备递归自我改进、最先进编码能力

modules/services/Ai.qml.english: Same performance as M2.7, faster inference (~100 tps)
modules/services/Ai.qml.chinese: 与 M2.7 相同性能，推理更快（约 100 tps）

modules/services/Ai.qml.english: Peak performance, ultimate value, master the complex
modules/services/Ai.qml.chinese: 巅峰性能、极致价值、驾驭复杂

modules/services/Ai.qml.english: Same performance as M2.5, faster inference (~100 tps)
modules/services/Ai.qml.chinese: 与 M2.5 相同性能，推理更快（约 100 tps）
强大的多语言编程，增强推理能力

modules/services/Ai.qml.english: Same performance as M2.1, faster inference (~100 tps)
modules/services/Ai.qml.chinese: 与 M2.1 相同性能，推理更快（约 100 tps）
智能体能力、高级推理、200K 上下文
